summary: Tradeify scored 82/100 when our research team tested and reviewed the popular US futures prop firm. Tradeify currently offers three challenge models: Growth (1-step evaluation), Lightning Funded (instant funding), and Select Challenge (1-step evaluation with a choice of Select Flex or Select Daily funded payout policy). The Advanced Challenge is no longer available for new purchases as of December 2025. All funded accounts (Growth, Lightning, Select Flex, Select Daily) are simulated, with Tradeify Elite Live as the real-capital live stage issued through NinjaTrader brokerage. Payout rules vary by funded account type, with a 90% profit split on sim funded accounts. Tradeify now highlights 80,000+ traders and $110M+ verified payouts.
pros: Real exchange access (CME, CBOT, COMEX, NYMEX)
Select Challenge offers choice of Flex or Daily payout policy
Up to 5 Simulated Funded Accounts allowed
Tradeify TV, free ebook, built-in journal, and Help Center resources
cons: Strict payout rules and consistency caps on Growth/Lightning
No weekend trading on any model
High fees for add-ons (Level 2 data, Order Flow+)
Advanced Challenge no longer available for new buyers
Monthly billing continues until manually cancelled
bestFor: Experienced futures traders who want real exchange access, multiple funding paths including instant funding and flexible payout policies, and fast payouts — especially intraday traders comfortable with Tradovate or TradingView
notIdealFor: Traders who rely on weekend holding, or traders in restricted countries. Also not ideal if you want a single simple payout structure — each funded type has its own rules

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict: 82/100
verdictBlocks.body:
Tradeify is a strong pick for futures traders who want real exchange access, multiple funding options, and a clean setup. With three current models — Growth, Lightning Funded, and Select Challenge — traders have genuine flexibility in how they approach evaluation and funded trading. The Select Challenge adds a unique twist by letting traders choose between Flex and Daily payout policies after passing.

All funded accounts (Growth, Lightning, Select Flex, Select Daily) operate as simulated funded accounts, with Tradeify Elite Live as the real-capital stage issued through NinjaTrader brokerage. Traders may be assessed for Elite Live after 5 payouts, with automatic transition at $80,000 combined payouts. Elite Live pays 90% on starting balance withdrawals and 80% on profits above starting balance.

Tradeify now offers Tradeify TV, a free ebook, a built-in journal, and Help Center material. The community has grown to 80,000+ traders with $110M+ in verified payouts. Payouts are fast, platforms are solid, and the rules are transparent — though each funded type has its own payout structure to understand.

faq.q: Is Tradeify a legit futures prop firm?
faq.a: Yes, Tradeify is a legitimate futures prop firm offering real exchange access through CME, CBOT, COMEX, and NYMEX. They highlight 80,000+ traders and $110M+ in verified payouts. Their Trustpilot profile shows a 4.7/5 rating from 1,800+ reviews. Tradeify Elite Live accounts are issued through NinjaTrader brokerage.

faq.q: How much is Tradeify per month?
faq.a: Tradeify's costs depend on the challenge type and account size. The Growth Challenge ranges from $139 to $339 per month. The Lightning Funded option is a one-time payment starting at $349 with no ongoing fees. The Advanced Challenge is no longer available for new purchases as of December 2025. Monthly billing continues until you cancel manually.

The Select Challenge is Tradeify's newest 1-step evaluation. After passing, traders must choose between Select Flex (no daily loss limit, 5 winning days per payout, payout caps of $3,000/$4,000/$5,000 by account size) or Select Daily (buffer system, $250 minimum payout, payouts on any trading day if the Daily Continuity Rule is met). This choice is permanent and irrevocable for that account. Select funded accounts have no consistency rule.

Tradeify Elite Live is the real-capital live trading stage. Tradeify may assess traders for Elite Live after 5 payouts, and automatic transition happens at $80,000 combined user payouts across sim funded accounts. Elite Live accounts are issued through NinjaTrader brokerage. Elite Live pays 90% on starting balance withdrawals and 80% on profits above starting balance.

faq.q: What countries are eligible for Tradeify?
faq.a: Most countries can join Tradeify, but some regions are restricted due to broker and compliance rules. You can sign up from the USA, UK, Australia, and most of Europe. However, countries like Afghanistan, North Korea, Russia, and much of Africa and the Middle East are fully blocked. Others, including China, Canada (Ontario), UAE, and South Korea, can access Sim Funded accounts but are not eligible for Live Funded status.
